attributes.description: Prefetch-based execution evidence for insider-threat investigations. Each panel filters the exploded execution timeline (one ES doc per recorded run timestamp) on a different forensic angle: user-profile execution, temp-location execution, remote-access tools, single-run binaries, and the full timeline. Use alongside the LNK, EVTX, and Shellbags dashboards for a complete picture of user activity.

attributes.title: Prefetch — Execution Evidence
